assessment_objectives.objective: results from Artificial Intelligence Test, Evaluation, Validation & Verification (AI TEVV) findings are evaluated against Artificial Intelligence (AI) and Autonomous Technologies (AAT)-related performance demonstrated for conditions similar to deployment settings.

results from Artificial Intelligence Test, Evaluation, Validation & Verification (AI TEVV) findings are evaluated against Artificial Intelligence (AI) and Autonomous Technologies (AAT)-related assurance criteria demonstrated for conditions similar to deployment settings.
